name: Prestix Agentix Workflows (B → A → C)
objective: Implement Prestix Agentix Workflows in 3 phases: (B) multi-step task execution, (A) agent-based tool use, (C) autonomous agent loop — all via opt-in sessionMode, extending assistant/interpreter without rewriting.
exit_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes for all interpreter files
npx vitest --run src/lib/interpreter — all tests green
All existing tests (19+ files) remain green
SessionMode extended: assistant | interpreter | agent | autonomous
Agent and autonomous modes are opt-in, default assistant mode unchanged
